## Improvements

Codex GPT-5.6 Model Support — Miko now includes `GPT-5.6 Terra` and `GPT-5.6 Luna` in the Codex model catalog. Terra is the new default Codex model for fresh sessions and default model preferences, while existing GPT-5.5/GPT-5.4 selections remain available.

## Validation

- `bun test src/server/provider-catalog.test.ts`
- `bun run lint`
- `bun run check`
